pioneer.loadTreeFailed: Failed to load the Pioneer USB library.
pioneer.loadingPlaylistTree: Loading the Pioneer USB playlist tree...
pioneer.emptyPlaylistTree: There are no visible playlists on this USB drive yet.
pioneer.selectPlaylistPrompt: Select a Pioneer playlist from the left first.
pioneer.emptyPlaylist: There are no visible tracks in this playlist yet.
pioneer.mixtapeVaultUnavailable: The Mixtape vault fallback directory is unavailable.
pioneer.copyToMixtapeFailed: Failed to copy tracks into the Mixtape vault.
pioneer.cleanMissingFilesConfirm: This will remove {count} track record(s) whose original audio files cannot be found from the current Rekordbox playlist. It will not delete audio files from disk. To restore them later, add the tracks back to the playlist.
pioneer.cleanMissingFilesRemovedCount: Removed {count} unavailable track record(s) from the playlist.
pioneer.cleanMissingFilesNone: This playlist has no tracks with missing files.
pioneer.fileMissingHintDetail: The {count} selected track(s) no longer have audio files at their saved paths, so there is nothing to process for this action.
pioneer.fileMissingHintAction: Put the files back at their original paths and try again. If these are stale records in the Rekordbox desktop library, you can also clean them from the playlist tree.
pioneer.fileMissingSingleDetail: This track's audio file is no longer at its saved path, so it cannot be played right now.
pioneer.fileMissingSingleAction: After putting the file back at the saved path, double-click again to recheck it.
pioneer.fileMissingPathUnavailable: This record does not have a file path that can be checked.
pioneer.copyFolderToLibraryConfirm: Copy "{name}" to {target} with its folder hierarchy, {count} playlist(s) in total.
pioneer.copyCueDefinitionsIncomplete: Some track cue points were not written to the local cache. The audio files were copied.
